<think> The question asks about the conference of the UAB Blazers football team in the 2013 season. In 2013, UAB was a member of Conference USA (C-USA). C-USA is a collegiate athletic conference whose member institutions are located in the Southern United States. Specifically, in 2013, C-USA had a divisional structure, and UAB was a member of the East Division. Therefore, the conference I am looking for is Conference USA, and the East Division is the specific division within that conference that UAB was a part of in 2013.</think>
<answer> Conference USA East Division </answer>
